description_long: This is a pastel pink arcade game cabinet with a whimsical, anime-inspired theme. The front features a large screen displaying a cartoon character with pink hair, flanked by two sets of arcade controls, each with a joystick and multiple buttons. The side panels are decorated with soft cloud motifs, white sparkles, and large 'P1' and 'P2' player indicators, while the back panel showcases a large illustration of a character in a maid outfit. The cabinet has a boxy, upright structure typical of classic arcade machines, with a slightly protruding control panel and a flat marquee area above the screen. The overall aesthetic is playful and inviting, with a strong pink and white color scheme and detailed character artwork.
description: A pastel pink arcade game cabinet with anime-themed artwork, dual control panels, and playful cloud and character graphics. The cabinet features a large screen and vibrant, decorative side and back panels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the screen with a pink-haired character, dual joysticks, and multiple buttons on the control panel.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying 'P2' in large white letters, cloud motifs, and sparkles on a pink background.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring a large illustration of a character in a maid outfit and the word 'Arcade' at the top.
description_view_3: Right side view with 'P1' in large white letters, cloud motifs, and sparkles on a pink background.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two sets of controls, each with one joystick and six buttons, arranged side-by-side for two players; controls are black on a pink panel.
attribute_marquee_artwork: The marquee area is pink with faint white text and cloud motifs, but no distinct illuminated artwork; the word 'maids' is faintly visible.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Side panels feature large white 'P1' and 'P2' text, white sparkles, and soft pink cloud motifs, matching the playful, pastel theme.
